note_markdown:
# Nimbus Systems Q2 FY2026 Earnings Note

Nimbus delivered a strong second quarter. Total revenue reached $612 million [F2], beating consensus and generating a beat of $12 million [C1]. EPS (diluted) was $1.28 billion [F1].

Management sharpened its demand commentary in the MD&A. "We continue to see strong demand from enterprise customers consolidating onto Stratus" [L1]

Aaron Mitchell asked about the Cirrus integration timeline. "We are very enthusiastic about the Cirrus combination. We expect native Cirrus query capabilities by the end of fiscal Q4 2026." [Q1]

Looking ahead, management committed to delivering Cirrus capabilities on schedule. "we expect native Cirrus query capabilities by the end of fiscal Q4 2026" [K1]

diffs.current_text: We continue to see strong demand from enterprise customers consolidating onto Stratus
diffs.prior_text: We see demand from enterprise customers adopting Stratus

qa_pairs.question_text: Can you give us more color on the Cirrus Analytics integration plan?
qa_pairs.answer_text: We are very enthusiastic about the Cirrus combination. We expect native Cirrus query capabilities by the end of fiscal Q4 2026.

commitments.commitment_text: Deliver native Cirrus capabilities inside Stratus console by end of Q4 2026
commitments.source_quote: we expect native Cirrus query capabilities by the end of fiscal Q4 2026
